final:
// // This register should not be initialized to zero upon reset
module top_module(output reg [7:0] reg_0x68, input wire reset, input wire wenb, input wire [7:0] in_data, input wire clk);always@(posedge clk)
	begin
		if(reset==1) begin
			reg_0x68<=8'h00;
		end
		else if (wenb==1) begin
			reg_0x68<=in_data;
		end
	end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This register should not be initialized to zero upon reset
